raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Preesteri / un tee Praweeschi/ un tee Laudis Dfir-
deja/ ka Jeremijus tchohs Wahr-
dus Deewa Namma runnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad Jeremijus bij pabet-
dsfs wiffu runnaht / fo tas
KUNGS bij pawehlejs us wif-
teem Laudim runnaht / tad fa-
grabhe winnu tee Preesteri/ un
tee Praweeschi/ un wiffi Laud-
dis/ un fazztija: Teeschain / tew
buhs mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rapehz drikfsti tu eeksch ta
KUNGA Wahrdn fluddinaht/
un fazztht: Schis Nains buhs
ta ka Sihlus/ tchis Pilssahts
buhs pohsta/ ka neweens tur
dsihvo? Un wifti Laudis tapul-
zejahs prett Jeremiju eeksch ta
KUNGA Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu tee Leel-Kungi no
Juhsda fchohs Wahrdus dsirde-
ja / gabje tee augfcham no ta
Fehnixa Namma uhs ta KUN-
GA Nammu/ un apfehdahs
preeksch ta KUNGA jauno
Wahrtu Durwim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja tee Preeste-
ri/ un tee Praweeschi us teem
Leel-Kungeem/ un us wiffeem
Laudim / un fazztija: Schis
Wihrs irr to Nahwi pelnijs/ jo
winch irr prett tcho Pilsshaftu
fluddinajs / ka juhs ar juhfahm
Ausfm effat dsirdejscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jeremijus runnaja
us wiffeem Leeleem-Kungeem/ un
us wiffeem Laudim / un faztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr mannt juf-
tifs fluddinaht prett scho (Dee-
wa) Nammu/ un prett scho
Pilsshaftu wiffus Wahrdus/ fo
juhs effat dsirdejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ darrajt juhsus
Zettus/ un juhsus Darbus pa-
reisns/ un paklaufsajt ta KUN-
GA juhsu Deewa Balksnei/tad
buhs tam KiNGAM tas Lau-
nums schehl/ fo winch prett
jums bij runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es/ rangi/ es etmu
juhtas Rohkas/ darrajt man/
ka jums pascheem labbi patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tomehr finnajt/ kad
juhs manni nokanseet/ tad krah-
feet juhs us jums nenoseedsigu
Affini/ un pahr scho Pilsshaftu/
un pahr winnu Eedsihvotajeem/
jo tas KUNGS irr manni pa-
teeft pee jums fuhtijs / wiffus
fchohs Wahrdus preeksch juh-
fahm Ausfm runnaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee Leeli-
Kungi/ un wiffi Laudis us teem
Preestereem/ un us teem Pra-
weescheem : Pee fcha Wihra ne
irr Nahwes Waina/jo winsch irr
us mutts runnajs eeksch ta
Wahrdn ta KUNGA muhfu
Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir zitti Wihti no teem
Wezzajeem tahs Semnes zeh-
lahs/ un runnaja uhs wiffu
Lauschu Drauds/ un fazztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mikus tas Maresiteris
irr eeksch tahm Deenahm Iskt-
jus/ ta Rehnixa no Juhsa flud-
dinajs/ un us wiffeem Laudim
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
